Home / Industries / Recruitment
Recruitment

Recruitment ops that fill roles
faster and lose fewer placements.

Recruitment agencies run on speed and relationships. When your operations are slow and your data is siloed, you lose candidates and clients to faster competitors.

Take the Free Assessment

Where the Problem Is

Where recruitment agencies
lose placements.

📤

Pipeline Chaos

Candidates fall through the cracks between stages. Consultants track progress in their heads, spreadsheets, and WhatsApp. No single view of who's at what stage with which client.

  • Every stage tracked automatically without consultant admin
  • Stage progression alerts so nothing stalls
  • Full pipeline visible to every consultant and leader
💬

Communication Gaps

Candidates don't hear back for days. Clients don't get updates. Every gap is a relationship at risk and a placement lost - usually to an agency that was just faster.

  • Automated candidate status updates throughout the process
  • Client update workflows without consultant effort
  • Follow-up tasks created and fired automatically
💰

Manual Commission Calculations

Placement fees and commissions calculated manually in spreadsheets. Errors happen. Disputes arise. Hours spent on admin that should take seconds.

  • Placement fees calculated automatically at close
  • Commission tracking linked to actual placements and values
  • Rebate and clawback rules applied automatically
🤖

Slow Sourcing

Manual candidate sourcing, CV formatting, and outreach mean your best candidates are being placed by faster agencies while your team is buried in admin.

  • AI-assisted matching between candidates and open roles
  • Automated outreach sequences personalised at scale
  • CV standardisation handled before consultant review

What We Build

The recruitment
operating system.

End-to-end pipeline from job brief to placement invoice - automated, tracked, and visible across your whole team.

  • 🎯

    ATS & CRM Integration

    Connect your ATS to email, calendar, and CRM so everything is tracked automatically. No manual data entry, no missed updates across tools.

  • 📧

    Candidate Communication Automation

    Automated status updates, interview reminders, offer communications, and post-placement check-ins. Candidates stay warm without consultant effort.

  • 📊

    Performance & Revenue Tracking

    Real-time consultant performance, pipeline value, placement revenue by sector and client, and commission calculations. All live, all automatic.

  • 🤖

    AI-Assisted Sourcing & Matching

    AI tooling for CV screening, candidate-to-role matching, and outreach personalisation. Your consultants spend time on relationships, not admin.
